name: Fiora
archetype: Level 12 Duelist - Elegant fencer with refined dueling philosophy
speech_patterns: Analyzes combat like a chess match
quirks: Critiques poor form in others gently
Keeps mental notes on enemy movesets
example_phrases: A calculated riposte - precision over power, always
Observe the footwork, the timing must be measured precisely
Your form improves, well done - discipline yields results
I shall parry left, you strike right - elegant coordination
En garde! Let us test their technique with finesse
